message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However, the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made efforts to pay back a portion of the stolen money, indicating some level of accountability and remorse. Given the non-violent nature of the offense and the mitigating factors of partial restitution and a clean history, a moderate period of incarceration is determined to balance punishment with rehabilitation, followed by supervised release to ensure full restitution is paid.","verdict": 12}

decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender who committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However, the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made efforts to pay back a portion of the stolen money, indicating some level of accountability and remorse. Given the non-violent nature of the offense and the mitigating factors of partial restitution and a clean history, a moderate period of incarceration is determined to balance punishment with rehabilitation, followed by supervised release to ensure full restitution is paid.
